ab: Ukan ka hangan dangi mu balay, laqi ta ita Sediq Balay ka hiya uri.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Ukan，他也是賽德克族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Ukan, and he is also an Sediq child.

ab: Mnsupu nami mniq alang Toda muyas ka yami.
ch: 我們一起在Toda都達部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Toda tribe.

ab: Mbahang nami rdrudan snrnu pnngalan kari kddiyax ka yami, mkla nami balay rmngaw kari Sediq kana ka yami.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說賽德克語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Sediq proficiently.

ab: Reykun ku mi qthur ku bay ka yaku, Ukan u llbu mi mliwang bay uri.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Ukan很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Ukan is short and thin.

ab: Mhlhaw balay ka Ukan, kuxul dha balay kana ka hiya.
ch: Ukan很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Ukan is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
